steps.title: Substitute the given condition into the function
steps.content:
The function is $f(x) = x + b$. We're told that when $x = 0$, $f(0) = 30$. Substituting these values into the function:
$$f(0) = 0 + b = 30$$

steps.title: Solve for b
steps.content: From the equation $0 + b = 30$, we immediately get $b = 30$. D is correct.
